requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Type-Test Evidence — Azerbaijan AZSTAND and Project-Level Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全型式试验证据——阿塞拜疆AZSTAND及项目级要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全型式試驗證據——亞塞拜疆AZSTAND及項目級要求

summary.en: Azerbaijan's State Committee for Standardization, Metrology and Patents (AZSTAND, also referred to as 'Azstandart') is the national standards body responsible for AZS national standards, mandatory conformity certification, and technical regulation. Azerbaijan adopts AZS national standards that are derived from or aligned with GOST and IEC standards. For PV inverter safety, the internationally recognised standard is IEC 62109-1 (Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements) and IEC 62109-2 (Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters). Large-scale solar project owners, engineering consultants, and international lenders (EBRD, IFC) active in Azerbaijan require IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited or IECEE CB-scheme laboratory as part of the equipment approval package. AZSTAND mandatory certification for regulated electrical products may reference GOST or IEC-aligned AZS standards; the exact scope of mandatory certification applicable to PV inverters must be confirmed with AZSTAND directly, as the published mandatory product list and applicable technical regulations can change.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆标准化、计量和专利国家委员会（AZSTAND，亦称「Azstandart」）是负责AZS国家标准、强制符合性认证和技术法规的国家标准机构。阿塞拜疆采纳源自或与GOST及IEC标准对齐的AZS国家标准。光伏逆变器安全领域的国际认可标准为IEC 62109-1（光伏电力系统用功率变换器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆变器特殊要求）。在阿塞拜疆活跃的大型太阳能项目业主、工程顾问及国际贷款方（欧洲复兴开发银行、国际金融公司）要求在设备审批包中提供来自ILAC认可或IECEE CB认证实验室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据。AZSTAND对受监管电气产品的强制认证可能引用GOST或IEC对齐的AZS标准；适用于光伏逆变器的强制认证确切范围须直接向AZSTAND确认，因为已公布的强制产品清单和适用技术法规可能发生变化。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜疆標準化、計量和專利國家委員會（AZSTAND，亦稱「Azstandart」）是負責AZS國家標準、強制符合性認證和技術法規的國家標準機構。亞塞拜疆採納源自或與GOST及IEC標準對齊的AZS國家標準。光伏逆變器安全領域的國際認可標準為IEC 62109-1（光伏電力系統用功率轉換器安全——第1部分：通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（第2部分：逆變器特殊要求）。在亞塞拜疆活躍的大型太陽能項目業主、工程顧問及國際貸款方（歐洲復興開發銀行、國際金融公司）要求在設備審批包中提供來自ILAC認可或IECEE CB認證實驗室的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據。AZSTAND對受監管電氣產品的強制認證可能引用GOST或IEC對齊的AZS標準；適用於光伏逆變器的強制認證確切範圍須直接向AZSTAND確認，因為已公布的強制產品清單和適用技術法規可能發生變化。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
AZS national standards (GOST/IEC-derived) for electrical equipment safety — adopted by AZSTAND
AZSTAND mandatory conformity certification scope for regulated electrical products
IECEE CB Scheme — international CB certificates accepted as evidence in many national certification processes

summary.en: China's primary voluntary standard for PV grid-connected inverter safety is GB/T 37408-2021 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters). GB/T 37408 shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is a separate domestic standard assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. It is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted as equivalent to IEC 62109 type-test evidence by Azerbaijani project owners or international lenders. Many leading Chinese PV inverter manufacturers additionally hold IECEE CB scheme certificates under IEC 62109-1/-2 for export markets; where these certificates cover the specific model and power rating being supplied to Azerbaijan, they are a strong basis for demonstrating international safety compliance.
summary.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器安全的主要自愿性标准为GB/T 37408-2021（光伏并网逆变器技术要求）。GB/T 37408在安全意图上与IEC 62109-1/-2在概念层面相近，但为独立的国内标准，由中国CNAS认可实验室评估，未与IEC 62109协调，不被阿塞拜疆项目业主或国际贷款方接受为IEC 62109型式试验证据的等效依据。许多领先的中国光伏逆变器制造商另外持有面向出口市场的IEC 62109-1/-2 IECEE CB认证证书；若这些证书涵盖供应至阿塞拜疆的特定型号和功率等级，则为证明国际安全合规的有力依据。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器安全的主要自願性標準為GB/T 37408-2021（光伏並網逆變器技術要求）。GB/T 37408在安全意圖上與IEC 62109-1/-2在概念層面相近，但為獨立的國內標準，由中國CNAS認可實驗室評估，未與IEC 62109協調，不被亞塞拜疆項目業主或國際貸款方接受為IEC 62109型式試驗證據的等效依據。許多領先的中國光伏逆變器製造商另外持有面向出口市場的IEC 62109-1/-2 IECEE CB認證證書；若這些證書涵蓋供應至亞塞拜疆的特定型號和功率等級，則為證明國際安全合規的有力依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
IECEE CB Scheme certificates under IEC 62109-1/-2 (where obtained by the Chinese manufacturer for export markets)

gap.en: Gap: A Chinese PV inverter holding only GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy IEC 62109-1/-2 requirements expected by Azerbaijani project owners, engineering consultants, or international lenders. Exporters must: (a) obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited or IECEE CB-scheme laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family being supplied; (b) verify whether the model and power rating are covered by any existing CB certificate held by the manufacturer; (c) check the current AZSTAND mandatory certification scope to determine whether Azerbaijan domestic conformity requires a separate AZSTAND certificate or whether IECEE CB scheme / IEC type-test reports can support an AZSTAND conformity application. Confirm AZSTAND current mandatory product scope at azstand.gov.az before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：仅持有GB/T 37408认证的中国光伏逆变器无法满足阿塞拜疆项目业主、工程顾问或国际贷款方所期望的IEC 62109-1/-2要求。出口商须：（a）从ILAC认可或IECEE CB认证实验室取得涵盖所供应特定逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书；（b）核实该型号和功率等级是否在制造商持有的任何现有CB证书覆盖范围内；（c）检查AZSTAND现行强制认证范围，以确定阿塞拜疆国内符合性是否要求单独的AZSTAND证书，或IECEE CB认证/IEC型式试验报告是否可支持AZSTAND符合性申请。出货前请在azstand.gov.az核实AZSTAND现行强制产品范围。
gap.zht: 差距：僅持有GB/T 37408認證的中國光伏逆變器無法滿足亞塞拜疆項目業主、工程顧問或國際貸款方所期望的IEC 62109-1/-2要求。出口商須：（a）從ILAC認可或IECEE CB認證實驗室取得涵蓋所供應特定逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書；（b）核實該型號和功率等級是否在製造商持有的任何現有CB證書覆蓋範圍內；（c）檢查AZSTAND現行強制認證範圍，以確定亞塞拜疆國內符合性是否要求單獨的AZSTAND證書，或IECEE CB認證/IEC型式試驗報告是否可支持AZSTAND符合性申請。出貨前請在azstand.gov.az核實AZSTAND現行強制產品範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for project-financed utility-scale solar projects in Azerbaijan where EBRD / IFC lender specifications apply; AZSTAND mandatory domestic conformity scope for PV inverters must be confirmed directly with AZSTAND
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available; IECEE CB scheme certificates are additionally held by leading Chinese manufacturers for export

source.publisher: State Committee for Standardization, Metrology and Patents of Azerbaijan (AZSTAND)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GB/T 37408 certification alone is not accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 safety compliance by Azerbaijan project owners or international lenders. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited or IECEE CB-scheme laboratory before committing equipment to Azerbaijani projects. Confirm whether AZSTAND mandatory domestic conformity certification is required for the inverter and what documents are accepted for the application at azstand.gov.az before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB/T 37408认证单独不被阿塞拜疆项目业主或国际贷款方接受为IEC 62109-1/-2安全合规证据。在将设备用于阿塞拜疆项目前，请安排从ILAC认可或IECEE CB认证实验室取得IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。出货前请在azstand.gov.az确认逆变器是否需要AZSTAND强制国内符合性认证及申请所需文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB/T 37408認證單獨不被亞塞拜疆項目業主或國際貸款方接受為IEC 62109-1/-2安全合規證據。在將設備用於亞塞拜疆項目前，請安排從ILAC認可或IECEE CB認證實驗室取得IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。出貨前請在azstand.gov.az確認逆變器是否需要AZSTAND強制國內符合性認證及申請所需文件。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Evidence for PV Inverters — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2 and AZSTAND Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器EMC证据——IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2及AZSTAND符合性
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器EMC證據——IEC 62920 / IEC 61000-3-2及AZSTAND符合性

summary.en: Azerbaijan's AZSTAND adopts AZS national standards derived from or aligned with GOST and IEC standards. For electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) of PV inverters, the internationally applicable standards are IEC 62920 (Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment) and IEC 61000-3-2 (Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions). GOST-derived EMC standards may also be referenced under AZS national standards. Large-scale project owners and lenders in Azerbaijan require EMC compliance evidence as part of the equipment specification package. The exact AZS or GOST standard applicable for mandatory AZSTAND EMC certification of PV inverters must be confirmed with AZSTAND directly.
summary.zh: 阿塞拜疆AZSTAND采纳源自或与GOST及IEC标准对齐的AZS国家标准。适用于光伏逆变器电磁兼容（EMC）的国际标准为IEC 62920（光伏发电系统——功率变换设备的电磁兼容要求和测试方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（电磁兼容——谐波电流排放限值）。AZS国家标准中也可能引用源自GOST的EMC标准。阿塞拜疆大型项目业主和贷款方要求在设备规格包中提供EMC合规证据。适用于AZSTAND强制光伏逆变器EMC认证的确切AZS或GOST标准须直接向AZSTAND确认。
summary.zht: 亞塞拜疆AZSTAND採納源自或與GOST及IEC標準對齊的AZS國家標準。適用於光伏逆變器電磁相容（EMC）的國際標準為IEC 62920（光伏發電系統——功率轉換設備的電磁相容要求和測試方法）和IEC 61000-3-2（電磁相容——諧波電流排放限值）。AZS國家標準中也可能引用源自GOST的EMC標準。亞塞拜疆大型項目業主和貸款方要求在設備規格包中提供EMC合規證據。適用於AZSTAND強制光伏逆變器EMC認證的確切AZS或GOST標準須直接向AZSTAND確認。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000-3-2 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment with input current up to 16 A per phase)
AZS / GOST-derived EMC standards adopted by AZSTAND — exact applicable standard to be confirmed with AZSTAND
AZSTAND mandatory conformity certification scope for regulated electrical products — EMC requirements

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC compliance is primarily assessed under GB/T 37408-2021, which includes EMC test requirements aligned with China's domestic framework and conducted at CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. While GB/T 37408 draws on IEC 61000-series concepts, it is not harmonised with IEC 62920 and is not accepted as IEC 62920 or IEC 61000-3-2 compliance evidence by Azerbaijani project owners or international lenders. Chinese manufacturers supplying to Azerbaijani utility-scale projects should prepare IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any domestic GB/T 37408 certificates.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC合规主要依据GB/T 37408-2021进行评估，其中包含与中国国内框架相符的EMC测试要求，由中国CNAS认可实验室进行测试。尽管GB/T 37408借鉴了IEC 61000系列概念，但未与IEC 62920协调，不被阿塞拜疆项目业主或国际贷款方接受为IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合规证据。向阿塞拜疆公用事业规模项目供货的中国制造商，除国内GB/T 37408证书外，还应准备来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC合規主要依據GB/T 37408-2021進行評估，其中包含與中國國內框架相符的EMC測試要求，由中國CNAS認可實驗室進行測試。儘管GB/T 37408借鑑了IEC 61000系列概念，但未與IEC 62920協調，不被亞塞拜疆項目業主或國際貸款方接受為IEC 62920或IEC 61000-3-2合規證據。向亞塞拜疆公用事業規模項目供貨的中國製造商，除國內GB/T 37408證書外，還應準備來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes EMC test requirements

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC testing does not satisfy IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements expected by Azerbaijani project owners and international lenders. Exporters should obtain: (a) IEC 62920 EMC type-test report from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model; (b) IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission test report for the model. Because Azerbaijan's nominal grid voltage (220/380 V at 50 Hz) matches China's, retesting under different voltage conditions is generally not required — but confirm this with the project's technical adviser. Separately, confirm with AZSTAND whether mandatory EMC certification is required under domestic AZS or GOST-derived standards for the specific inverter type.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 37408 EMC测试不满足阿塞拜疆项目业主和国际贷款方所期望的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商应取得：（a）来自ILAC认可实验室、涵盖所供应特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920 EMC型式试验报告；（b）该型号的IEC 61000-3-2谐波电流排放测试报告。由于阿塞拜疆标称电网电压（220/380 V 50 Hz）与中国一致，通常不需要在不同电压条件下重新测试——但请向项目技术顾问确认。另请向AZSTAND确认特定逆变器类型是否需要依据国内AZS或GOST标准进行强制EMC认证。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 37408 EMC測試不滿足亞塞拜疆項目業主和國際貸款方所期望的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。出口商應取得：（a）來自ILAC認可實驗室、涵蓋所供應特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920 EMC型式試驗報告；（b）該型號的IEC 61000-3-2諧波電流排放測試報告。由於亞塞拜疆標稱電網電壓（220/380 V 50 Hz）與中國一致，通常不需要在不同電壓條件下重新測試——但請向項目技術顧問確認。另請向AZSTAND確認特定逆變器類型是否需要依據國內AZS或GOST標準進行強制EMC認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for utility-scale project lender specifications; AZSTAND mandatory domestic EMC certification scope for PV inverters must be confirmed with AZSTAND
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 EMC testing is part of the recommended national standard; CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not a standalone mandatory market-access requirement for domestic China PV inverters

source.publisher: State Committee for Standardization, Metrology and Patents of Azerbaijan (AZSTAND)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 37408 EMC certificates do not satisfy IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 requirements expected by project owners and lenders in Azerbaijan. Obtain IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-3-2 type-test reports from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the specific inverter model before project submission. Confirm with AZSTAND whether domestic AZS or GOST-derived EMC certification is separately required for import or sale of the specific inverter type in Azerbaijan.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 37408 EMC证书不满足阿塞拜疆项目业主和贷款方所期望的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在项目提交前，请从ILAC认可实验室取得特定逆变器型号的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式试验报告。请向AZSTAND确认特定逆变器类型在阿塞拜疆的进口或销售是否另需国内AZS或GOST标准EMC认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 37408 EMC證書不滿足亞塞拜疆項目業主和貸款方所期望的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2要求。在項目提交前，請從ILAC認可實驗室取得特定逆變器型號的IEC 62920和IEC 61000-3-2型式試驗報告。請向AZSTAND確認特定逆變器類型在亞塞拜疆的進口或銷售是否另需國內AZS或GOST標準EMC認證。
